programme.title: Built For Billions
programme.desc: ‘Built for Billions' uncovers the blueprints behind the world's biggest tech empires-how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: Built For Billions

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC's longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E3 - Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Tensions rise when drought overtakes an ancient Sri Lankan temple shared by tufted grey langurs, toque macaques, and purple-faced leaf monkeys. Witness the drama as the lower-ranking primates struggle to stay hydrated amid a mutinous plot.

programme.title: E2 - Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighborhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it’s a daily battle to stay alive.

programme.title: E1 - Australia
programme.desc: Scan the Australian skies, which regularly deliver some of the world’s most volatile weather. Await cooling monsoon rains, watch lightning ignite vast wildfires, and marvel at the ingenious adaptations that help wildlife deal with these extremes.

programme.title: E2 - North America
programme.desc: Experience the powerful, colourful phenomena that swirl across the heavens in North America. Watch polar bears search for food under the aurora borealis, map the frigid path of a polar vortex, and elude violent tornadoes with a prairie dog family.

programme.title: E1 - Australia

programme.desc: Experience the powerful, colourful phenomena that swirl across the heavens in North America. Watch polar bears search for food under the aurora borealis, map the frigid path of a polar vortex, and elude violent tornadoes with a prairie dog family.

programme.title: E3 - Chasing Mako
programme.desc: In some of the most-remote regions on the planet, researchers dive deep and brave danger to unlock secret shark behaviours, challenge myths about sharks, and fight for the protection of these supreme predators – before it’s too late.

programme.title: E2 - March-April - a Time of Renewal
programme.desc: Travel around the globe to witness the atmospheric shifts that take place in March, from the wave of cherry blossoms that unfold across Japan to the final raft of green sea turtles that arrive on the Great Barrier Reef islands to lay eggs.

E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E6 - Baby John Meets Our Local Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John is meeting our amazing local heroes! He discovers the important role of a police officer in the community & learns that they are here to help keep everyone safe. Then, he gets inspired by firefighters & forms his very own rescue team! The heroic day continues as the kids learn about all different kinds of jobs on career day at preschool & Baby John decides to take on a new challenge: becoming an ambulance driver!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E3 - Let's All Play Together with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's all play together with JJ! In this inspiring adventure, JJ & his classmates learn to never give up & help each other when they face an obstacle, spreading kindness with a simple wave. Then, JJ plays a fun game of 'follow the leader' with his dad! The learning continues as Ms. Appleberry teaches the class that it's okay to make mistakes. Plus, JJ's Mom teaches the kids how to properly say hello to a new pet!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Songs!
programme.desc: It's time to sing your favorite songs with JJ & his animal friends! Join JJ as he puts on a performance of 'Old Macdonald,' where each of his animal pals gets to show off their funny sounds on stage. Then, watch as Wally the director puts on a play version of the rhyme 'Hey Diddle Diddle'! The musical fun continues as the friends work together to magically grow jumbo fruit for their smoothie stand & take a wild ride in a submarine they thought was just a toy!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Clubhouse Game Day
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate clubhouse game day with JJ & his friends! The competition heats up as JJ & Wally compete in an adrenaline-pumping go-kart race full of fun tricks & obstacles. Then, it's time for a silly game of hide-and-seek, where Boba finds the most clever hiding places! The games continue with a balloon boat race, a round of Duck Duck Goose & a clean-up dance party after the clubhouse gets messy. It's a day packed with fun & friendly competition!

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

Search for the Big Seven Part 1: The Garden of Eden
programme.desc: When a group of young explorers set off for an adventure in the vast Addo Elephant National Park in South Africa, they get more than they bargained for. They meet buffalo, snakes and a giant lizard big enough to kill a rabbit.

programme.title: Trip to Bhutan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo wish each other a happy New Year when Alim arrives and wishes them a happy birthday. Confused, they follow him to Bhutan, where their friend Dorji explains that in this Himalayan country, everyone turns a year older on New Year's Day.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Old Luggage
programme.desc: Packed with fun DIYs, Hepi and Briko take us on an adventure!

programme.title: Day of the Invisibility
programme.desc: Sarah's bought a onesie that turns her invisible, and she and Ricky use it to play tricks on Gav. Ricky conjures a geometric kite design and fashions a stained-glass rocket inspired by Charles Rennie Mackintosh.

programme.title: Cat Toy
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat toy.

programme.title: The Bad Wolf's Great Fall
programme.desc: During the school treasure hunt, Humpty Dumpty hides eggs and serves as MC. Rose and students are repeatedly ambushed by the Bad Wolf. After a failed showdown, Rose tries to put Humpty back together and stop the Wolf.

programme.title: Rise Up!
programme.desc: Eric learns that yeast is used to make bread rise and that it produces gases when it feeds on sugar. He does an experiment with a balloon to show how this works.

programme.title: Everything We've Waited For
programme.desc: It's Amelie and Phoebe's turn to head to the Artistic British Championships, and for the first time, they will be competing as seniors. Phoebe is showing a new move on the uneven bars, and Amelie is performing her new floor routine.

programme.title: Soaked to the Skin!
programme.desc: Dr Chris gets a soaking in the lab, picking a shade of purple leaves people gobsmacked in Mindbenders, and who will get snotted in Ouchology?

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Neurons, Neurons, Neurons!
programme.desc: Eric learns that neurons are the brain's tiny building blocks. He does an experiment to show what they are and how they work. He is surprised to learn that giraffes have neurons that are five metres long.

programme.title: Old Luggage

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: Paperclip
programme.desc: Nothing is too boring for Hepi and Briko. Watch them make fun things with paperclips.

programme.title: Cat Taxi
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat taxi.

programme.title: Can Slime Think?
programme.desc: Slime mould are cleverer than they look even though they don't have eyes, a skeleton, a nervous system, or even a brain. They are single-celled organisms. There are more than 900 species of them all over the world.

programme.title: Repair Old Things
programme.desc: Join the Grimwade family as they save the planet by going green. When the youngest family member starts sitting up, it's time to think about moving baby Houston to a cot. But the old one is dirty and worn. Which of the 5 R's should they use today?

programme.title: You're Mostly Made of Water!
programme.desc: Did you know you're mostly made of water? Find out how as the doctors say hello to your hypothalamus - the amazing part of your brain that keeps you hydrated.

programme.desc: By using gridlines, an object can be scaled up (magnified) or scaled down (shrunk). In this episode mathemagician Eric shows how to draw a picture of yourself that's completely to scale - even if the original is teeny tiny!

programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: Fun With Okinawa Dialects
programme.desc: Get familiar with Okinawa dialects by listening to folk tales and children's songs.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: When Nobunaga learns that Nagamasa has defected to the Asakura side, he flies into a rage. However, thanks to Tokichiro's quick thinking, he regains his composure and decides to retreat. Tokichiro serves as the rear guard, while Koichiro takes on the most dangerous role in the retreat. Thus begins a desperate withdrawal fought by the two brothers. Meanwhile in Kyoto, Yoshiaki (Onoe Ukon), having learned of Nagamasa's betrayal, reaches a grave decision of his own.

programme.title: Gretel's Magical Oven
programme.desc: Each week, a particular sweet and its recipe will be introduced along with various topics about the sweet.

programme.desc: Children search for wonders worldwide and challenge themselves to communicate with foreigners in English through puppet shows, games, animation, and more. Have fun and learn English naturally with a witch, Kyary Pamyu Pamyu!

programme.title: Train Driver's Cab View
programme.desc: A journey through Japan seen from the train driver's seat. This episode revisits cherry‑blossom scenery along local railways across the country, captured in footage filmed a year ago.

programme.desc: The artist AI listens to your problems about parenting, work, and relationships. If you've had a tough day, join us for 30 minutes-this program may help you find a brighter tomorrow.

programme.title: The Great Nature 'Wind-Shaped Miraculous Scenery'
programme.desc: Experience marvelous nature that you have never seen before. This program introduces ultimate forms of ‘great nature' including ground, ocean, and natural phenomena of the earth that existed from 4.6 billion years ago.

The Confidence Man JP: Episode of the Hero
programme.desc: The “Third Generation Tsuchinoko” -- the master con man hailed as a “hero” has died. Dako, Boku-chan and Richard all honed their skills under his tutelage. The title of 'Tsuchinoko' is handed down in secrecy to the Confidence Man (scammer) with the greatest skill, setting the stage for a showdown between his three star pupils. The contest will take place in the world heritage city of Valletta, Malta, an international gathering place for the rich and famous.Their target is the invaluable ancient Greek sculpture “Dancing Venus”, currently owned by a wealthy, retired Spanish gangster. Each scammer adopts a unique strategy in pursuit of the target, but the police and Interpol are also hot on their heels. Who will laugh last?! No one knows how the biggest scam in history will end! Who is the true 'hero' and what is the ultimate 'truth'? The last con game, grand finale, Battle Royale...begins now!

programme.title: Back Home
programme.desc: Heung Wing has been sensitive to paranormal activity and keeps seeing ghosts since he was a kid, which is called having “Yin Yang” eyes. To avoid being excluded by his peer, he was taught to pretend nothing happened, even though he knew their existence. He then left from Hong Kong to Canada because of his miserable childhood. One day, Heung Wing is told that his mother has been in coma by committing suicide, which forces him to return to Hong Kong. When he goes back to the old home, everything looks strange and unfamiliar to him. What's more horrifying is, a series of weird cases happen in the neighbourhood, and ghosts show up in front of him again. The situation is deteriorating beyond his imagination...

programme.title: Nocturnal
programme.desc: One day, the dead body of Min-tae only brother Seok-tae was found, and Seok-tae ‘s wife Moon-young has disappeared. While searching for clues on this brother's death, Min-tae found that a novelist Ho-ryung also following the same trail and he discovered that the death of his brother was predicted in Ho-ryung's bestselling novel, ‘Nocturnal.' Min-tae was thrown into confusion and brother's gang and police also getting involved in the case. To find out the truth behind brother's death, Min-tae began a relentless and furious pursuit...

programme.title: The Whistleblower
programme.desc: An earthquake of 6.6 magnitude strikes Malawi in southeast Africa. Eco Energy Technology, an Australian energy conglomerate with business in the region, sends its rescue team for emergency response. Meanwhile, in an exclusive resort in Australia, Chinese expatriate Mark (Lei Jiayin) runs into his ex-lover Wen (Tang Wei), now married to the chairman of Han Coal Group. Their old feelings rush back but soon he is dragged into something bigger with Wen... and turn into a night of passion, before Wen flies off to China in the morning. That afternoon, Mark is devastated to learn that the plane Wen took has crashed, with no sign of survivors. Two weeks have passed. Mark is trying to leave the past behind, when a mysterious call puts him in limbo. Mark discovers Wen cheats death after failing to catch the flight. Before figuring out the next step, they are tracked down by killers wherever they flee. Someone obviously wants her dead for good. Hopelessly outpowered, Mark pledges to pro

programme.title: E201 - An Imposter Among Us

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Plankton must work together to survive an island of deadly monsters. // SpongeBob teaches Patrick how to ride a bike.

programme.title: My Holy Car - An Obsession Made In Germany - Part 2
programme.desc: More than 140 years after its invention, the car remains a source of fascination for many people. In Germany, for example, there are more vehicles on the road than ever before. For some, the car is a cult object. But it also deeply polarizing.

programme.title: Making Change Green, Fair And Clean
programme.desc: Retrofitting conventional vehicles could help Delhi go electric more equitably. Also: women farmers battle age-old structures - and making power from bird poop.

programme.desc: Retrofitting conventional vehicles could help Delhi go electric more equitably. Also: women farmers battle age-old structures - and making power from bird poop.

programme.title: My Holy Car - An Obsession Made In Germany - Part 2
programme.desc: More than 140 years after its invention, the car remains a source of fascination for many people. In Germany, for example, there are more vehicles on the road than ever before. For some, the car is a cult object. But it also deeply polarizing.

programme.desc: Santa and Uncle Grandpa must work through their personal differences in order to save Christmas.

programme.title: E18 - A Bulldozer's Unlucky Day
programme.desc: It’s Lucky’s first day on the job as a bulldozer. When he gets upset about making mistakes, Big Bird and Nina tell him that it’s ok to make mistakes.

programme.title: The National Dog Show
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: E29 - Mermaid
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help them find a Mermaid so they can take its picture for school. They explore the ocean floor in their search where they encounter lots of ocean creatures.

programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa follow a trail of muddy footprints and find Po in bed with very muddy feet. The Noo-Noo cleans off the mud.

programme.desc: Percy causes confusion for everyone and prompts delays, when he spends too much time panicking over nothing.

programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: E4 - All Fired Up
programme.desc: Paname pays tribute to the Paris firefighters, as well as to fire and flames in all their forms.

programme.title: E4 - Holding One's Breath With Champion Marine Simonis
programme.desc: At the heart of the Transatlantic Crayer Street Evening event, an evening on Crayer Street, in Ixelles, which turns into an open-air museum. Also: a meeting with freediver Marine Simonis; the celebration of the Wallonia-Brussels Federation in Paris; a 100% Belgian and 100% organic vineyard.

programme.title: E34 - La Motte - Mez-Le-Marechal
programme.desc: The La Motte castle, in Chateaurenard, once ruled by Marguerite de Maleissye, has stood the test of time. After serving as a hospital during the war, it is now privately owned. In ruins, the Mez-le-Marechal castle has been abandoned for centuries. But its new owner has decided to give it a new life.

programme.title: E25 - Metamorphosis Of A Very Small House In Brussels
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie are in Woluwe-Saint-Pierre to discover the complete metamorphosis of a small terraced house.

programme.title: E10 - Julie De Libran
programme.desc: One of the most Parisian and unusual designers discusses her spring-summer 2023 haute couture collection. The focus is firmly on the versatility of the garments, the work on the bias and sequins...

programme.desc: An investigative show highlighting societal issues like corruption, local government problems, illegal activities, poverty, disloyalty, cleanliness, education, wasted public funds, youth, and public health and safety.

programme.desc: Features a different full-length, cinema verite style documentary that often tackles social issues such as poverty and corruption.

programme.desc: The show tackled real-life crimes such as murder, trafficking, and abductions through interviews and dramatizations, offering insight into investigations.

programme.desc: How far would you go to start your own family? Siobhan Marin meets Australians turning to surrogacy, despite huge costs and risks, and discovers why some women call it empowering, while others warn it's exploitation.

E8
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 以美食為介質的全新文化訪談類節目，每集邀請文化名人、名廚大師、外籍帥哥、直播網紅和民間饕客一同做客飯局，在品嚐民間美味的同時，分享人生故事。

programme.title: E9 - 50歲也要見「家長」？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E1 - 研習演員初亮相
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: E9 - 50歲也要見「家長」？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E9 - 50歲也要見「家長」？

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 「青春守藝人」系列微紀錄片，穿越千年文脈，跋涉千山萬水，記錄傳統非遺的煥新故事，聆聽青春傳承的時代之音。一期一會，影像留住記憶，涵養精神文脈、厚植文化自信，向世界呈現絢爛多彩、賡續綿延的中華文明。

programme.desc: A cooking show hosted by RG Enriquez-Diez, showcasing plant-based recipes inspired by Filipino cuisine and beloved Filipino dishes.

programme.title: Soco[Live]
programme.desc: The iconic investigative docudrama returns with gripping interviews and reenactments of real-life crimes. Veteran host Gus Abelgas is joined by ABS-CBN's top crime reporters: Zyan Ambrosio, Dennis Datu, Jeff Caparas, Lyza Aquino and Jessie Cruzat.

programme.title: Mmk[Live]
programme.desc: Dubbed as the longest-running drama anthology on Philippine TV with Charo Santos - Concio narrating real-life stories of ordinary people in this award-winning masterpiece that takes pride of its well-crafted storylines, excellent performances and topnotch production details.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.desc: A weekly TV Mass broadcasted from the ABS-CBN Studios.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Fruit Punch
programme.desc: Five young men threw themselves with heart and soul into the work force. They have different approaches and different life styles. Ah Kit is the hardworking investment broker. He is so busy making money. Ah Chi is a postman believing in fung shui. Ah Hark is an apprentice in his family jewelry shop and Ah Wai failed in public exam. Ah Ming is the most unconventional of the five. Working in a Japanese restaurant. The five start a laundry shop which soon folds. Next, they try something new to save their business. Ah Ming leads a carefree life which dismays his girl, Yoko. Ah Hark's girlfriend Cat will move to Australia and leave him soon. Ah Ming and Ah Hark are going to lose their girlfriends. The five new generation are going their own ways...

programme.title: The Diary Of A Big Man
programme.desc: In this delightful screwball comedy, Chow Yun Fat plays a stock broker who met 2 women of his dream on the same night - boutique owner Joey (Joey Wang) and air stewardess Sally (Sally Yeh). Unable to say no to either one, he ended up marrying them both, one in New York and the other in Paris. When the wives befriended each other, he solicited the help from his buddy Hung (Waise Lee) to get him out of each tight spot.

E10
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！
